items.title: Managing client sessions
items.description: Open an HTTP/SDK client or connection pool in a with block so it is reliably closed after each request, preventing leaked sockets.

items.title: Timing and tracing model calls
items.description: Wrap a model call in `with timer('llm'):` to record latency consistently, with the measurement guaranteed even if the call errors.

items.title: Scoping temporary configuration
items.description: Temporarily switch model, temperature or API base inside a with block and automatically restore the previous values on exit.

items.title: Transactions and locks
items.description: Database transactions and threading locks are exposed as context managers so commits/rollbacks and releases happen deterministically.

items.title: File and resource I/O
items.description: Reading prompts, writing logs or caching embeddings to disk uses with open(...) so handles always close, even on partial failures.
